summary: Completed testing of Society Admin endpoints and UI. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working for admin and non-admin users.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard API throws error in some browsers without HTTPS or permissions. Consider adding try-catch with fallback.

issues: Missing DialogDescription in Edit Society dialog (console warning)

passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/societies/{society_id} - Admin can update society name
Backend: PUT /api/societies/{society_id} with regenerate_code=true - Admin can regenerate join code
Backend: PUT /api/societies/{society_id} with regenerate_code=true - Non-admin rejected (403)
Backend: PUT /api/societies/{society_id}/admin/{player_id} - Admin can transfer admin rights
Backend: DELETE /api/societies/{society_id}/members/{player_id} - Admin can remove member
Backend: DELETE /api/societies/{society_id}/members/{player_id} - Admin cannot remove self (400)
Backend: 404 returned for non-existent society operations
Frontend: Society info card displays correctly with name and member count
Frontend: Join code displayed prominently with copy button
Frontend: Settings button visible for admin users only
Frontend: Regenerate code button visible for admin users only
Frontend: Edit Society dialog opens and shows society name input
Frontend: Admin badge displayed for admin users
Frontend: Crown icon shown next to admin in members list
Frontend: Make Admin and Remove Member buttons hidden for non-admin users
Frontend: Leave Society button visible for all members
action_items: Consider adding try-catch around clipboard API call in copyJoinCode function
Add DialogDescription to Edit Society dialog to fix accessibility warning
critical_code_review_comments: Backend admin authorization uses query parameter (admin_id) which is less secure than header-based auth, but acceptable for this app's scope
Frontend correctly checks user.is_admin for showing/hiding admin features

test_credentials.admin_user: TestAdmin (society: Test Golf Society, code: NPFUJH)

seed_data_creation: Created test society and players during pytest run (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Society admin features fully tested. Backend endpoints enforce admin-only access correctly. Frontend UI shows/hides admin features based on user.is_admin. Multiple 'phil g' users exist in database with different societies - login matches first user found by username.
